verbatim_text: Well, that doesn't help you, does it? It was this really horrible conversation that lasted on for way too long. I think Jake still sees a psychologist because of it. Eventually he cleared it up. And we decided actually that day that we all go with Yu, the Yu song, which I think is actually the Chinese pronunciation. Anyway, Yu actually petitioned to transfer. And he actually came to Cornell with our group. And we spent another two years here at Cornell and published even more. When he was done, I think we published four papers together. I think each one has over 1,000 citations. So every single one was a really, really big problem that we solved together. It was really, really fun. When he was done, he went to grad school to Berkeley. Berkeley, as far as I think, people told me the first few years he went around and searched for a really, really, really big problem and then found it.
